CVE-2020-25739.title: An issue was discovered in the gon gem before gon-6.4.0 for Ruby. ...
CVE-2020-25739.description: An issue was discovered in the gon gem before gon-6.4.0 for Ruby. MultiJson does not honor the escape_mode parameter to escape fields as an XSS protection mechanism. To mitigate, json_dumper.rb in gon now does escaping for XSS by default without relying on MultiJson.
